description: Letter from Barhun Levi b. Ishaq concerning a deceased man, a debt, and power of attorney. He informs the addressee, whose name is lost, that he had made a wakila (וכאלה) against Yusuf b. Ibrahim al-Iskandarani, to whom he had sold something and quotes a document. Ibn al-Kuhli, Futuh b. ‘Azun, and the city of Damsis are mentioned. Dated 450 of the Muslim Era (= 1058 CE). Remains of directions on verso. (Information from Goitein's index cards) EMS
description_he: מכתב מברהון לוי בן יצחק בעניין מת, חוב וייפוי כוח. מזכיר שטר שכירות כנגד יוסף בן אברהם, 1058.
